name: Align validate strictness with husky pre-commit + fix test categorization + cross-platform Doppler resolver
description: Three related gaps in pre-push/validate strictness parity: (1) check-change-class.sh --run does not run tsc --build, so type errors on agent-driven check-change-class validate runs are missed that pre-commit/pre-push catches; (2) tests like apps/api/src/services/idempotency-assistant-state.test.ts sit in *.test.ts (picked up by pnpm test:api:unit) but need DATABASE_URL — they silently skip or error when run without Doppler; (3) scripts/pre-push-tests.sh loadDatabaseEnv resolver is hardcoded to C:/Tools/doppler/doppler.exe and fails on macOS/Linux agent environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Root causes: (1) check-change-class.sh:200-203 adds tsc --build under the typescript class but only as a fast command when TS files change — validate --run correctly includes this; gap is that agent-driven codex runs call scripts/check-change-class.sh --run (not --fast) and tsc IS included. Re-verify gap: run 'bash scripts/check-change-class.sh --run' on a TS-file delta and confirm tsc --build fires. (2) Tests needing DATABASE_URL: grep apps/api/src -r --include='*.test.ts' -l for files that import or call DB directly but are NOT *.integration.test.ts. Rename any found to *.integration.test.ts (pre-push ignores integration tests via testPathIgnorePatterns). (3) scripts/pre-push-tests.sh Doppler path: the script does NOT hardcode C:/Tools/doppler — DATABASE_URL is set by the CI environment or by the caller of the script. The pre-push hook itself does not run doppler; it reads DATABASE_URL from env. Gap (3) is about how agents invoke tests locally. Done: (a) confirm check-change-class.sh --run includes tsc for TS changes (re-run test); (b) identify and rename mis-categorized integration tests from *.test.ts to *.integration.test.ts; (c) document in AGENTS.md or pre-push-tests.sh that the Doppler invocation for local DATABASE_URL is the caller's responsibility (DOPPLER_CLI env override or 'command -v doppler' detection in a wrapper). Variants: three distinct gaps. Verification: (b) run pnpm test:api:unit without DATABASE_URL and confirm zero DB-touching tests run (they should be in integration now).
